title: Dead 'thinking: on' config in five bundled classifier agent YAMLs — silently dropped by classify path
body: All five bundled classifier agent YAMLs in packages/pi-behavior-monitors/agents/ (hedge-classifier, commit-hygiene-classifier, fragility-classifier, work-quality-classifier, unauthorized-action-classifier) declare 'thinking: on' in their spec. The classify path at packages/pi-behavior-monitors/index.ts:1235-1248 does NOT forward thinking to the complete() call — the parameter object passed to complete() omits the thinking field entirely. The comment at index.ts:1231 acknowledges that the Anthropic API rejects thinking + forced toolChoice, so thinking must stay off when the dispatch uses a phantom-tool verdict shape. Net effect: YAML config is dead — agents authors writing new classifier YAMLs will repeat the mistake. Gated on DEC-0002 (.project/decisions.json) which proposes that executeAgent in pi-jit-agents enforce thinking=off when toolChoice.type === 'tool' is present and emit a structured diagnostic warning. Bundled YAML updates are STORY-006 of FEAT-001 in .project/features.json. Canonical owner: FEAT-001 + DEC-0002.
